creator: filip@parag.rs
text:
> I've cleaned up the patch a bit, hope you don't mind.
> Let me know if you'd prefer certain bits to be different or something.

Thanks for adding the port!

I agree with the changes you made; they are now upstreamed:
https://github.com/filiparag/wikiman/commit/70b856863e9a5515ed07c7f9bbf7763a054db8ba
